name: logseq-linear
description: Linear integration for Logseq — link issues, create tickets, sync status
author: Maxim Khomiakov

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && cp logo.png dist/ && node -e "const p=require('./package.json');p.main='index.html';delete p.scripts;delete p.devDependencies;require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2))"
